title: Coin Change
hints: Consider how the answer for a smaller amount relates to the target amount. If you knew the best way to make amount minus one coin, could you extend that?
Use dynamic programming. Define an array where each index represents a specific amount and stores the minimum coins needed to reach it.
The value at index i depends on values at smaller indices. Initialize the array with infinity, except for index 0 which is zero, to handle impossible cases.
